MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Chun Tam (415.260.7928; kevintam168@gmail.com) Defendant/Judgment Debtor in propria persona.
Court provided Cantonese Interpreter, Connie Chen is present via Zoom.
no other appearances.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

*** Order signed after hearing: Defendant shall remit $100/pay period ($200/month) to judgment creditor to service the debt.***

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Continued To Sep-12-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant CHUN C. TAM in pro per and assisted by certified Cantonese-language court interpreter MIMI LAIN;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF CACH LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter discussed.

The Court grants defendant Mr, Tam's request for a continuance to obtain legal representation, and continues this matter one more time to September 12, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Clerk to notify plaintiff's counsel of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

**** Clerk leaves a voicemail message with plaintiff's counsel Robert Colclough and a message with Mr. Colclough's assistant Karen via telephone number 818-906-0120. ****
